violations.claim: VIOLATION: filed++ in dry-run path — return value { filed } misrepresents actual
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 152
; VIOLATION: filed++ in dry-run path — return value { filed } misrepresents actual
; GitHub issues created. Caller cannot distinguish "printed" from "filed."
(declare-const is_dry_run Int)
(declare-const filed_before Int)
(declare-const filed_after Int)
(declare-const actual_github_issues_created Int)
; Code transition: dry-run branch entered — filed++ executes after printing
(assert (= is_dry_run 1))
(assert (>= filed_before 0))
(assert (= filed_after (+ filed_before 1)))
; Code transition: dry-run path has no fileIssue() call — zero GitHub issues created
(assert (= actual_github_issues_created 0))
; Violation: filed_after > actual_github_issues_created — misleading return value
(assert (> filed_after actual_github_issues_created))
(check-sat)

clause_history.clause:

; VIOLATION: filed++ in dry-run path — return value { filed } misrepresents actual

(declare-const is_dry_run Int)

(declare-const filed_after Int)
(declare-const actual_github_issues_created Int)
; Code transition: dry-run branch entered — filed++ executes after printing
(assert (= is_dry_run 1))
(assert (>= filed_before 0))
(assert (= filed_after (+ filed_before 1)))
; Code transition: dry-run path has no fileIssue() call — zero GitHub issues created
(assert (= actual_github_issues_created 0))
; Violation: filed_after > actual_github_issues_created — misleading return value
(assert (> filed_after actual_github_issues_created))
(check-sat)
